figures.caption: Figure 1. The architecture and training dynamics of ARIMA, from the tokenization, window encoding (left), to structured pianoroll reconstruction and contrastive next latent prediction (right)
Table 1. Downstream evaluation results. Bold / underline: best / second-best among comparable-scale models (≤ 110M); the public Aria models are foundation-scale references, excluded from the ranking.

Table 2. Ablation study on ARIMA variants. Performance of all tasks is reported. The no-prediction variant has no h result because the predictor is inactive. Bold / underline: best / second-best per column across all rows.
